response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of fullstack experience, including recent TypeScript/Node.js product work, hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling (a required and rare skill), MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes, and a demonstrably deep testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses). A CS degree, conference talks, and workshops signal strong communication. The main gaps are no explicit Nest.js experience, frontend depth that leans more toward Ember.js than React, and no evident Kotlin or Python, which slightly tempers an otherwise strong fit.
strengths: 18+ years of fullstack experience with recent TypeScript/Node.js work and current AI-agent/MCP development matching a required skill
Deep testing and software craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, and taught testing courses
Broad platform experience (cloud, Docker, Kubernetes, MongoDB/SQL) plus proven communication via talks and workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, a primary framework in the stack
React exposure appears limited to one role; much of the frontend history is Ember.js
No demonstrated Kotlin or Python, both listed in required language proficiencies

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
Missing Nest.js and limited React depth
